title: A Runaway with a Late Start

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My first three years in the Twinkle Series with
Mejiro Palmer are over. She's had incredible
success during this time...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And as a result, she is gifted an equally incredible
present for her efforts.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Now! To commemorate all of Mejiro Palmer's
achievements...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
A reward! This is a special gift from the sponsors
behind the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Please be sure to deliver it to her safely!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That is my mission from Director Akikawa. The
question is, how should I present it to her?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh crap! I'm sooo late! Why today of all days?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Where's Trainer? There's no way I can get away
with being this late scot-free... Hang on, I don't
see Trainer anywhere...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: No way... Am I not the only one who's late?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Nah, that can't be it. Something must've come
up...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: B-beep!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Eeep! Sorry! I'll get outta the... H-huh?
choice_data_list: Get in, Palmer, we're going on a joy ride.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vrooooom...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I show Mejiro Palmer a good time with a long
drive along the coast.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
This is totally awesome! Put that pedal to the
metal! Woohoo! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She shrieks with joy and laughter as the wind
whips through her hair.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fshhh, fshhh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Whew, we're pretty far out. Driving around
without a destination in mind is pretty awesome,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Once in a while, I just wanna break away from the
daily grind and do whatever I feel like doing,
y'know? ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, that's true. I've been doing nothing but
running away from my tiny, insignificant self and
the path that was decided for me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And now, I've finally got this far and found some
confidence. Thanks to that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ah... The breeze feels so good. I'm not scared of
anything anymore!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Well, I wasted a lot of time fidgeting at the
starting line and took forever to get out the gate
till you showed up.
choice_data_list: But you still caught up with your own two legs.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I started living up my life later than
everyone else, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's never too late to change! Whatever I might
not have now, I can still get my hands on in the
future!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of things she might not have yet, now
might be the time to give her one such thing.
choice_data_list: By the way, I have something for you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: For me? What is it? Something really hype?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I turn her to face the car we drove to get out
here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You mean... the rental car? Are you asking me to
drive us back?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! No way, are you messing with me?!
What are you talking about?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that the sponsors of the Twinkle Series
decided to reward her with a car to celebrate her
victories and achievements.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: A trophy car... Then, that really is mine now...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Does that mean I can do whatever with it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
YAAAY! This is the bestest thing ever! Now we
can go wherever, whenever!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: We've hit the all-you-can-drive lottery, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I nod, but there's something I can't help asking
her.
choice_data_list: Why did you say "we" and not "I"?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, well, I didn't do this all on my own, so I
thought we should share the prize.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
By the way, could you give the car a name,
please?
choice_data_list: You want me to name it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I wanna use it for a long, long time, so
make it a name I won't get bored of. Y'know,
something we can really treasure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something that reflects the value of her
accomplishments... A name worth treasuring...
Only one option comes to mind.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait, but that's...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hold up... That's what you think we should
treasure?
choice_data_list:
Yep. It's to celebrate you and your
achievements.

Yep. It's to celebrate you and your
achievements.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Okay. Let's roll with that. I do like keepin'
things simple.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, the Mejiro Palmer! I knew there's nothing I
can't get my hands on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A satisfied grin for the ages spreads across her
face. That's pure joy if I've ever seen it.
choice_data_list: Have you been wanting a car?
Have you been wanting a car?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: A car... Maybe, yeah? But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
There're a lot of other things I want. But for now, I
wanna take the Mejiro Palmer out for a spin!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer might've had a late start, but she
caught up in the blink of an eye and is now
pushing to the front.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vrooooom!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Faster, Trainer, faster! To the limits!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Woohoo! Freedom is the bestest ever! Go, Mejiro
Palmer, gooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: VROOOOOM!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Mejiro Palmer pumps out even more speed.
Once, she might have been a runaway who got a
late start and whom nobody knew...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But now, she's running far, far ahead of everyone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's leading the way on a path no one knew even
existed, all while leaving her mark as the freest
Mejiro of all time.
